{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Meditations
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meditations]] is a book that [[Pilgrims]] may carry.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
